title: Multiple dependencies
excerpt: Is there any possibility that when I have 2 items dependent on 1 item that it messes up the timeline?

posts.author: VeronikaKunova (Veronika Kunova)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any possibility that when I have 2 items dependent on 1 item that it messes up the timeline?

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Veronika,

Nope. This is a pretty normal use case.

Good luck!
